compiled_state.title: test-check-local-env-docker-skip.sh fails when Docker daemon is not running
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 0 (BASIC). Test fails when Docker daemon is not running.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fix: when NO_DOCKER=1, create shadow dirs that symlink everything except docker from PATH dirs containing docker. This makes command -v docker fail while preserving access to other tools like gtimeout.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
